name: frontend-dev
description: React component scaffolding, a11y audits, responsive checks, refactoring, and design system compliance

commands.name: scaffold-component
commands.description: Scaffold a React component with props, TypeScript/JSX, tests, and Storybook story

commands.name: a11y-audit
commands.description: Run a WCAG 2.1 AA compliance audit using axe-core patterns

commands.name: responsive-check
commands.description: Audit responsive design — media queries, viewport handling, and touch targets

commands.name: refactor
commands.description: Refactor a React component — decompose, extract hooks, reduce complexity

commands.name: design-system
commands.description: Check design system compliance — tokens vs hardcoded values

agents.name: frontend-reviewer
agents.description: Holistic frontend reviewer combining all 5 command capabilities

skills.name: react-patterns
skills.description: React hooks, composition, state management, and performance patterns

skills.name: css-architecture
skills.description: BEM, CSS Modules, Tailwind, and responsive design patterns

skills.name: a11y-standards
skills.description: WCAG 2.1 AA, ARIA, keyboard navigation, and screen reader support
